title: Repair Vocabulary In Context
trigger: Low accuracy in vocabulary-in-context or repeated word meaning mistakes.
steps: Review context clues and tone words.
Write the repeated mistake in the error log.
Revise flashcards before the next timed set.

title: Repair Percentage Questions
trigger: Weak percentage accuracy, especially increase, decrease and base-value questions.
steps: Write the original value before solving.
Review formula and unit mistakes after each set.

title: Repair Main Idea Reading
trigger: Repeatedly choosing true details instead of the central idea of a passage.
steps: Read the first and final sentence carefully.
State the passage purpose in one line.
Reject options that are too narrow.
Review wrong answers before attempting another passage.

title: Repair Cell Biology Concepts
trigger: Confusion between organelle names, functions and cell structure facts.
steps: Review organelles by function, not only by name.
Connect mitochondria with ATP and ribosomes with proteins.
Use chapter maps to connect the weak topic with the wider chapter.
